title: February Dividend Kings: 5 Buys; 1 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years."--Dogs of the Dow. title: The Dividend Kings Ranked By Quality Score

title: 5 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For January

title: The Buy-Hold-And-Go-Fishing REIT Portfolio
text: Many former landlords look to obtain income from REITs, seeking to escape the need for close monitoring or worry. This article considers sensible expectations and sensible objectives for such investments.
